# Security Policy

For full portfolio-level security policy (reporting, severity SLAs, disclosure), see:
**[Armosphera/A1-portfolio/SECURITY.md](https://github.com/Armosphera/A1-portfolio/blob/main/SECURITY.md)**

**TL;DR — reporting a vulnerability:**
- Do NOT file a public GitHub issue.
- Email **ops@a1-suite.local** with subject `[SECURITY] <repo-name>`.
- Acknowledgment within 48 hours, triage within 5 business days.
- Severity targets: Critical 7d, High 30d, Medium 90d, Low next release.
